markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Automate the creation and updates of connector landing pages in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal:** Automate Webflow landing page creation for \~20 current connectors (scaling to 1,000s) using content from an open-source GitHub repo.](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)
  - [**Method:** A GrowthX-managed cron job will poll the GitHub repo for changes (using the `changelog` file as a trigger), transform the content, and push updates to Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [**Blocker:** The Webflow CMS template requires updates to support dynamic content (e.g., `Example Prompts`, `Entities & Actions`).](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [**Timeline:** GrowthX will deliver a working automation by next week (Mon/Tues).](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Manual Page Creation

  - [**Goal:** Create dedicated landing pages on the main domain for each agent connector.](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)
  - [**Current State:** Content is auto-generated as Markdown from an open-source GitHub repo and published to a Docusaurus docs site via GitHub Actions.](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [**Challenge:** The current manual process for creating Webflow pages is not scalable for the expected growth from \~20 to 1,000+ connectors.](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)

### Solution: Automated Workflow

  - [**Architecture:** A GrowthX-managed cron job will poll the open-source GitHub repo directly, eliminating the need for complex GitHub Action integrations.](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [**Trigger:** The cron job will use the `changelog` file to detect meaningful updates, preventing unnecessary pushes.](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [**Content Transformation:** An LLM will parse the Markdown content and structure it into a JSON object that matches the Webflow API's required format.](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [**Update Cadence:** A daily update is sufficient, as the docs site already refreshes every two hours.](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)

### Blocker: Webflow CMS Template

  - [The current Webflow template is not configured for the required automation.](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [**Required CMS Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [**`Example Prompts`:** Must be made editable via the CMS (currently hard-coded).](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [**`Entities & Actions`:** Must support a dynamic, flexible number of items (e.g., Asana has 22 entities).](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
      - [**`Logo`:** The field must be changed from a static image upload to a reference field that pulls from the existing "Connectors" collection.](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [**Logo Source:** Kirkland will investigate if logos can be pulled from an S3 bucket, which would simplify the workflow by avoiding cumbersome Webflow API lookups.](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Yellowstone:**](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
      - [Update the Webflow CMS template to enable editing for `Example Prompts` and `Entities & Actions`.](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [Change the `Logo` field to a reference field.](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
      - [Investigate if connector logos are available from an S3 bucket.](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
      - [Build and test the automation workflow with a single connector.](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
      - [Deliver the final, automated solution by next week (Mon/Tues).](https://fathom.video/share/1cvuomzcsuwxAc95pg2tyxqa8zxDSzEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
